title: Celebrating the Return of Gambheera
description: Capture the essence of the OG universe in a single edit or poster. High contrast, low light, maximum impact.

title: Indian Cinema at the Global Stage
description: Re-imagine the grand battle sequences of RRR and Baahubali. Show us your version of a legend.
rules: Must include at least one Star profile work.

title: The Shadow Manifesto
description: Our first ritual. A call for all editors who dwell in darkness. The founding edition that defined the Set's visual soul.
rules: Any noir or dark-genre source material.
Black and white or high-contrast color grading mandatory.

title: Silent Frames
description: No dialogue. No music. Only visual storytelling. The second chapter of the Neo-Noir rituals.

title: The Origin Reel
description: First edition. Celebrate the scenes that defined Indian cinematic scale. Where it all began for Epic Builders.
rules: Must feature a crowd or battle sequence.
